# Becker's Restaurant

> Homestyle cooking in Ashtabula, Ohio. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner served seven days a week, with big portions, a full bar, and a case full of fresh-baked treats.

## Business facts
- Business: Becker's Restaurant
- Location: Ashtabula, OH
- Phone: (440) 993-1131
- Email: Beckersrestaurant7228@yahoo.com
- Service area: Ashtabula, OH, Ashtabula County, OH
- Rating: 4.6 stars (412 reviews)
- Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday: 07:00-21:00 | Sunday: 07:00-16:00

## Common questions
- What are Becker's Restaurant's hours? We’re open Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM, and Sunday 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner are served every day.
- Where is Becker's Restaurant located? We’re at 1601 West Prospect Road, Ashtabula, OH 44004, with plenty of parking right out front.
- Do you host special events? Yes. We host special events throughout the year, including our popular Murder Mystery dinner theater. Follow us on Facebook for the latest schedule.
- Do you cater events? We do. From family gatherings and work events to showers and memorial meals, we cater for groups big and small across Ashtabula County. Call (440) 993-1131 to plan your event.
- Do you have a full bar? Yes. Becker’s has a full bar with margaritas, specialty cocktails, beer, and wine (21+ with valid ID). We also bake fresh muffins, cookies, and cinnamon rolls in-house every day.
- Can I reserve the private room? Absolutely. Our private room is built for birthdays, showers, work lunches, and celebrations of all kinds. Call (440) 993-1131 to reserve it.

## Contact
Call (440) 993-1131 or email Beckersrestaurant7228@yahoo.com for more information.
